data.title: BNB Surpasses 600 USDT with a 7.37% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 13:03 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 602.969971 USDT, with a narrowed 7.37% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Reddio's White Paper Highlights Integration of AI with Parallel EVM
data.description:
According to PANews, Reddio has released a white paper detailing the integration of automated AI execution within the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) ecosystem. This development aims to fill a gap in the Ethereum ecosystem's AI capabilities. The concept of a parallel EVM has been seen as a crucial step in bridging the technological gap between the traditional EVM ecosystem and high-performance chains like Solana and Sui. 

While other projects like Sei and Monad have garnered significant attention and funding, Reddio has maintained a low profile, focusing on showcasing its test network's stability with high transactions per second (TPS) data. Recently, Reddio announced its intention to validate the ecological value of parallel EVM within the Ethereum ecosystem.

The parallel EVM addresses the limitations of the original EVM's single-threaded execution and sequential transaction processing. By leveraging modern hardware capabilities, such as CPUs and GPUs, along with asynchronous I/O storage and state access optimizations, it enables simultaneous execution of large-scale transactions. Reddio's white paper outlines a GPU-based execution network that uses a CUDA "code translator" to convert standard EVM opcodes into complex computational tasks executable on GPUs. This setup, combined with I/O optimizations and optimistic concurrency control, enhances transaction processing capabilities.

The parallel EVM's hardware performance advantage aligns naturally with AI applications, which require large-scale parallel computation and intensive processing. This synergy opens up new possibilities for deploying AI models on the blockchain, allowing smart contracts to directly manage AI tasks. Additionally, the integration of technologies like zero-knowledge proofs (ZK) and trusted execution environments (TEE) can enhance data privacy and verifiability, facilitating the native fusion of blockchain and AI. Potential applications include real-time AI inference, AI oracles, and off-chain AI strategy optimization.

data.title: BNB breaks through 600 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 7.55%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that BNB has broken through 600 USDT and is currently trading at 603.1 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 7.55%.

data.title: DeFi Education Fund Appoints New Executive Director Amid Growing U.S. Focus on Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, as Washington intensifies its focus on cryptocurrency, the DeFi Education Fund is undergoing leadership changes. The organization has appointed its Chief Legal Officer, Amanda Tuminelli, as the new Executive Director. Tuminelli will assume her new role on March 17.

data.title: Jupiter Lianchuang discloses that it is carrying out the third iteration of smart slippage "RTSE"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter co-founder Meow posted on the X platform that Jupiter is currently working on the third iteration of smart slippage, called RTSE (real time slippage estimator), which supports providing slippage-related signal information, including real-time price data, failure/success rates, etc., to help traders determine the best and safe slippage.

data.title: DWF Labs Partner: Signed an “8-digit” investment deal with a project
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DWF Labs partner Andrei Grachev posted on the X platform that he had just signed an "8-digit" investment deal with a very interesting project and would announce more news soon.

data.title: "Trump sell-off" makes Wall Street uneasy, and the voices of buying on the dip have subsided
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News "In just a few weeks, Trump has begun to silence the stock traders who like to buy on dips and have set the tone for Wall Street for most of the past 20 years. Instead, more and more people are calling for locking in profits and staying on the sidelines as Trump's trade war chaos subverts the economic outlook, and there is uncertainty about who will be the winners (if any) in the new era of the stock market. Dave Maza, CEO of Roundhill Investments, said: "Buying stocks that are falling now is like buying discounted tickets to a show without knowing who is performing." "Unlike every time buying on dips was reliable before, the increased uncertainty of tariffs and trade policies means that investors will eventually either win big or lose badly." Ted Mortensen, managing director of Robert W Baird & Co., said, "We are now in capital preservation mode." He said that the market, especially the technology industry, is also facing some common headwinds in spring. He said that anyone who wants to enter now has not "experienced some very bad cycles." (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Short-Term Rate Futures Indicate June Rate Cut
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. short-term interest rate futures continue to suggest that the Federal Reserve will implement a rate cut in June. This expectation persists following the release of U.S. initial jobless claims and Producer Price Index (PPI) data.

data.title: CEX trading volume fell 20% in February, but Binance still maintained the largest market share
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: As macroeconomic concerns affected investor sentiment, the trading volume of centralized exchanges fell by 21% last month to $7.2 trillion. Among centralized exchanges, Binance ranked first with a market share of 27%, followed by Crypto.com (8.1%) and Bybit (7.4%), while Coinbase (COIN) and MEXC Global ranked in the top five. (Coindesk)
